1.premise: A creepy comment can masquerade as an online double-standard complaint.

2.premise: An impression of an ideal woman can become a breakup reenactment.

lines.text: Hey everybody.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: So I'm a man, so I get a
lines.label: setup

lines.text: little discouraged about the double
lines.label: setup

lines.text: standard that exists online between men and women.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: For example, a girl can post
lines.label: setup

lines.text: herself at the beach wearing a bikini.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Gets thousands of likes,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: hundreds of comments from other girls.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Same things like yes queen.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Slay girl.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Pop off diva.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I say one innocent comment like, "Wow, what a babe," and I get blasted.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: They say creep. They say loser.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Or most often they say, "Wow, dude, she's only 11. Can you believe this people?"
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: So I don't do many impressions.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I do one.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: This is my impression of a Latina, but not just any Latina.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: This is one that is both brilliant and gorgeous.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: So give me a second while I get into character.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Okay. Soy mejicana, soy mejicana, soy mejicana.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: No, no, no. CCC, okay, listo.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm breaking up with you, Brian.
lines.label: punchline
